MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GISELLE AHLFELD'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-04-430015 WITH CASE CGC-05-443834.
APPEARANCES: John Nash, Esq., 415-661-5481, Law Office of John Nash for Plaintiff and Moving Party. No other appearance in this matter.
RULING: Mr. Nash was prevented from arguing the motion for failure to comply with Tentative Ruling CRC 324. The Court adopts its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR - MATTER MUST BE CALENDARED IN DEPT. 301 AS LOWER CASE NUMBER CONTROLS IN MOTIONS FOR CONSOLIDATION. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay.
